offer: For insurance claims managers processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient tracking causes delays in processing. We streamline claim status tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Inefficient tracking of claim statuses leading to delays in processing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance claims managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance claims managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among claims managers
try_it: Let users try alert notifications and dashboard for claim overview
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing claim data
